title: Randomly Rotated Flower Pots
description: Adds random rotations to flower pots and all potted flowers
body:
A simple pack that makes flower pots and potted flowers rotate in four random directions.
<hr>

NOTE: The rotation **cannot** be controlled by the player and is entirely dependent on the block the pot is placed on
<hr>

You can find all of my rotation packs in [this collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/Q0861PqC) :)

<center>
